title: CMMC 2.0 AC.L2-3.1.1 — Cisco ISE Strong-Authentication Coverage Evidence
evidence: Saved search archived to `audit_evidence` with CMMC AC.L2-3.1.1 tagging.

compliance.assurance_rationale: CMMC 2.0 AC.L2-3.1.1 — limit information system access to authorized users. UC-17.1.39 evidences EAP method drift detection — a regression to weak EAP would violate AC.L2-3.1.1.
compliance.controlObjective: Demonstrate that authentication methods on CUI-relevant networks remain on strong EAP (TLS, TEAP) without regression to weak methods (LEAP, EAP-MD5).
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.20.21' archiving EAP method drift evidence to `audit_evidence` with `cmmc_clause=AC.L2-3.1.1`.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Weak EAP detected on CUI NAD. Evidence captured.
controlTest.negativeScenario: All CUI NADs strong EAP. Empty result; control attested.

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263) + Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).
spl:
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode=5200 earliest=-1d
| where EapAuthentication IN ("LEAP", "EAP-MD5")
| lookup cmmc_cui_nad_inventory.csv calling_station_id OUTPUT cui_relevant
| where cui_relevant="yes"
| stats count by EapAuthentication, ssid
| eval cmmc_clause="AC.L2-3.1.1", control="Strong_Auth_CUI"
| collect index=audit_evidence
description: We continuously evidence CMMC 2.0 AC.L2-3.1.1 — strong-authentication method coverage on CUI networks.
value: CMMC 2.0 audits will probe for weak-authentication regression. Daily archived evidence (zero-result steady state) is the regulator-quality artefact.
implementation: Schedule the saved search daily at 06:00 local time; archive results to the `audit_evidence` summary index for NERC CIP evidence.
visualization: CMMC AC.L2-3.1.1 panel: weak-EAP regression count.
knownFalsePositives: 1. Legacy IoT devices in approved-exception list.
detailedImplementation:
## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.39 operational.
- `cmmc_cui_nad_inventory.csv` maintained.

## Step 1-5

```ini
[UC-22.20.21: CMMC AC.L2-3.1.1 — Strong Auth Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.20.21,reg=CMMC,clause=AC.L2-3.1.1
```
grandmaExplanation: We continuously evidence CMMC 2.0 AC.L2-3.1.1 — strong-authentication method coverage on CUI networks. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.
